home.heroQuote: "It is among the leading cardboard packaging manufacturers in Azerbaijan."
home.sustainabilityQuote: "We aim to meet not only today's needs, but also the growing market needs of the future. Therefore, we goal to develop in the paper cardboard sector and create new future-oriented business lines."
home.supportProductionDesc: Our goal is to contribute to the economy of Azerbaijan by creating a paper production sector.
home.supportSectorDesc: Our goal is to meet all types of paper needs by creating an Offset and Printing sector.
home.supportMarketDesc: Our goal is to reduce the country's import dependency in this sector through the production of molded pulp (viyol) and paper bags.
home.recyclingDesc: By collecting waste paper, we aim to prevent environmental pollution and protect the ecological balance.
home.productDesc: Our cardboard products manufactured with high quality raw materials and modern technology.
home.boxDesc: Custom packaging solutions in various sizes and durability.
home.listDesc: High quality, multi-layered industrial cardboard sheets.

aboutSection.subQuote: "Our enterprise, which started operating in 2025 with state support..."
aboutSection.mainDesc: It ranks high among the most modern and largest cardboard manufacturers in Azerbaijan. Established in the Sumgayit Chemical Industrial Park, Baku Cardboard is one of the companies with increasing production capacity and state-of-the-art technological equipment in the cardboard manufacturing sector.
aboutSection.visionText: To maximize customer satisfaction with state-of-the-art equipment under the slogan "Safe, quality and on-time production"...
aboutSection.missionText: To achieve a position where competition in quality and price is unmatched, making profitable and sustainable growth long-lasting. To become a trusted, preferred company and a leader in the corrugated cardboard and packaging sector.

footer.desc: The hub of durability and innovation in Azerbaijan's packaging industry. We empower your business with high-quality cardboard solutions.
footer.address: Azerbaijan, Sumgayit Industrial Zone, Baku Cardboard Factory, AZ5000
footer.copyright: Baku Cardboard LLC. All Rights Reserved.

aboutPage.title: ABOUT US
aboutPage.subTitle: Baku Cardboard: Quality, Reliability and Vision for the Future in Packaging
aboutPage.leadText: Baku Cardboard is one of the leading manufacturers of cardboard boxes and packaging products in our country. For years, we have been based on the principles of high quality, continuous development, and customer satisfaction in our operations.
aboutPage.subText: With modern technologies and the experience of our professional team, we offer innovative and practical solutions that meet the packaging needs of all types of businesses. We are not just a manufacturer, we are a partner that adds value to your brands and reliably protects your products.
aboutPage.economyDesc1: As Baku Cardboard, we are proud to contribute to the development of the country's economy through our activities. By increasing our production capacity, we meet the demand for local products, reduce dependence on imports, and strengthen our competitiveness.
aboutPage.economyDesc2: In addition to ensuring the employment of our employees, we also support our society by creating new jobs. For us, development is not just about business growth, but also about increasing the economic potential of our country.
aboutPage.recycleDesc1: Environmental protection is one of the main priorities of Baku Cardboard. We adhere to environmental principles in our production process and strive to use natural resources efficiently.
aboutPage.recycleDesc2: Cardboard, the main raw material of our products, is a completely recyclable material. By doing so, we reduce the amount of waste, prevent deforestation, and help create a cleaner environment for future generations. For us, environmental responsibility is not just a slogan, it is an integral part of our daily activities.
aboutPage.quote: "By choosing Baku Cardboard, you get high-quality packaging and support your country's economy and environmental protection."
aboutPage.target: Our goal is to develop your business and build a more sustainable future together.
